data.description: Header.tsx nav opens on hover only (handleMouseEnter). Touch devices cannot hover. Cross button is tappable (40x40) but at 25% opacity with no label — not discoverable. Mobile users past the hero section have no way to navigate except scrolling to the footer. Need a mobile-friendly nav pattern (hamburger, bottom nav, or improved cross affordance).
data.title: Add mobile navigation pattern (nav unreachable on touch after hero)

data.body: Review ASMV-43: PASS. All 9 acceptance criteria met. Cross button opacity raised to 50% on mobile. Fullscreen slide-down overlay with large serif italic links (28-40px), staggered entrance animation. Links close overlay on tap. Desktop hover-expand behavior preserved unchanged via hidden md:flex and isMobile() guards. Body scroll locked when overlay open. Resize handler auto-closes overlay past breakpoint. Proper aria-hidden, aria-expanded, aria-label, and tabIndex management. pnpm build and lint pass clean. No new dependencies. allLinks includes About for mobile completeness (not in desktop nav, present in footer). No rework needed.
